scenarios.description: children() on an Element with no child nodes returns an empty Elements list (loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create a standalone Element with no children

scenarios.description: children() on an Element with one child Element returns a single-element list (loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: Element has exactly one child node of type Element
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list contains exactly that one Element

scenarios.description: children() filters out non-Element nodes and returns only Element children (mixed-node filtering)
scenarios.precondition: Element has mixed childNodes including non-Element TextNode and an Element
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list contains only the Element child, excludes TextNode

scenarios.description: children() caches the filtered list on first call and reuses it on second call without recomputation (cache-hit)
scenarios.precondition: Element has two Element children; second call should hit cache
scenarios.expectedResult: first and second calls return equal list instance (==), same contents

scenarios.description: children() invalidates cache after childNodes change via nodelistChanged (cache-invalidation)
scenarios.precondition: Element with two children; after calling children(), modify childNodes by empty(), which triggers cache invalidation
scenarios.expectedResult: after modification, new children() returns empty list not equal to initial cached list
